slide1.body: Shintsha izinhloso zakho zezemvelo zibe umthelela weqiniso. Joyina umphakathi womhlaba othatha izinyathelo ezilinganiselwa ukuvikela ikhaya lethu elabelwanayo, isinyathelo ngesinyathelo.

slide2.body: Bumbana eziNdinganeni ukubhekana nezinselele zezemvelo ezisobala. Ndawonye, uhlelo luzisa ushintsho lweqiniso.

slide3.body: Qeda izinselele, bhala ubufakazi obelula, ubone imizamo yakho eqinisekisiwe ishoshozela izinhloso zeNdinganiso yakho.
